role: The individual is a motivational speaker and mentor who focuses on inspiring various groups including women entrepreneurs, caregivers in the Alzheimer's community, corporate teams, higher education personnel, and families. They play a crucial role in providing support, guidance, and strategies to help these groups manage stress and maintain connections in challenging circumstances. Their work involves public speaking, workshops, and possibly personalized coaching sessions aimed at fostering resilience and promoting mental well-being among their audiences.
